title: Negative shift
description: Negative shift can move future values into current rows.

title: Backward fill
description: Backward fill can leak future observations into earlier missing values.

title: Future row indexing
description: Positive-offset row indexing can read future rows for current decisions.

title: Global quantile for online signal
description: Full-sample quantiles can leak future distribution information into online decisions.

title: Global fit for online signal
description: Unscoped model or scaler fitting can use future observations for current decisions.

title: Hardcoded absolute path
description: Generated code must use provided data bindings instead of hardcoded absolute paths.

title: Forbidden optional import
description: Generated code should not import unavailable optional packages outside the sandbox contract.

title: Future regime label
description: Regime labels used at time t must not depend on future recovery, future drawdown, or ex-post segment boundaries.

title: Risk after optimization
description: Risk controls should not be bolted on after selecting an aggressive strategy or leverage value.
